positive: A maximalist, highly stylized illustration of a celestial forest meeting a cosmic tide. The central focus is a stylized, geometrically perfect crescent moon floating amidst giant, bioluminescent flora and fauna. The style must be a mix of Art Deco architecture and psychedelic nature motifs, rendered with sharp, clean lines and deep black silhouettes contrasting against vibrant, glowing neon blues, magentas, and gold leaf accents. Composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed for repeating print placement on fabric. Use strong radial symmetry and visible, crisp linework. Dramatic, high contrast lighting. Ideal for a wearable, sophisticated tattoo-style print.
negative: blurry, noise, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, text, signature, watermark, asymmetrical, disfigured, mutated, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photo, realistic, sketch, grainy
